sampleRows.brandName: Map My Genes sibling World Ancestry sample
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample cover identifies a World Ancestry Report for Jennifer Doe, Version Vdr 1.0, from Galatea Bio, followed by a welcome narrative from the Galatea team.
sampleRows.description: Observed on page 1 of the local sample PDF; this row documents report identity and opening structure only.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the rendered sample PDF cover and introduction; personal name and sample identity are not reused as local user data. Used here only as sibling map-style ancestry output-structure evidence for Map My Genes; this is not a direct Map My Genes sample report and not local map-coordinate, exact homeland, ethnicity-percentage, chromosome-painting segment, migration-path, relative, family-tree, community, identity, or health evidence.

sampleRows.brandName: Map My Genes sibling World Ancestry sample
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample hierarchy shows 100% total, 95.9% European, 4.1% American, and 2.9% East Asian, accompanied by a map, donut chart, and region legend.
sampleRows.description: The sample overall ethnicities section demonstrates a nested hierarchy and global map presentation. These percentages are sample-only output structure, not local ancestry findings.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from the sample PDF page 1 Overall ethnicities section and rendered page review. Used here only as sibling map-style ancestry output-structure evidence for Map My Genes; this is not a direct Map My Genes sample report and not local map-coordinate, exact homeland, ethnicity-percentage, chromosome-painting segment, migration-path, relative, family-tree, community, identity, or health evidence.

sampleRows.brandName: Map My Genes sibling World Ancestry sample
sampleRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample hierarchy lists Scandinavian 36.6%, Iberian 28.2%, Eastern Europe 16.4%, Northwest European 8.8%, and Basque 7.0% under European ancestry.
sampleRows.description: Observed European subregion rows in the sample PDF. Do not normalize these values or use them as local ancestry estimates.
sampleRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Extracted from page 1 and cross-checked against rendered ethnicity-card pages 5-9. ancestryScopeSummary.autosomal: Autosomal ancestry can provide broad reference-panel similarity when a model is supplied; this fixture does not supply calibrated local percentages.
ancestryScopeSummary.mapContext: A map-style report can visualize broad context, but it should not be treated as a literal coordinate, fixed homeland, migration route, or identity label.
ancestryScopeSummary.siblingSampleRows: The World Ancestry sample percentages, maps, chromosome painting, ethnicity cards, and methodology rows are output-format examples only and are not local findings.

whatThisDoesNotMean: This is not an exact local ethnicity percentage.
This does not identify a precise map coordinate, homeland, tribe, community, nationality, migration route, family tree, or living relatives.
This is not a family-matching or genealogy-relative report.
This is not a health or disease-risk report.
The sibling World Ancestry sample rows are not direct Map My Genes results.
